# Cosmos Cookbook

> Practical implementation guide for NVIDIA Cosmos generative world foundation models. Contains runnable recipes for inference, post-training, data curation, and end-to-end workflows across robotics, autonomous vehicles, and vision AI domains. Targets developers and researchers building physical AI systems.

## Getting Started

- [Setup](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/getting_started/setup/): Install dependencies and configure your environment for running Cosmos models.
- [Cloud Platforms](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/getting_started/cloud_platform/): Run recipes on cloud GPU infrastructure (AWS, GCP, Azure, Brev).

## Core Concepts

- [Data Curation](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/core_concepts/data_curation/): Video dataset preparation, quality scoring, and filtering for Cosmos model training.
- [Post-Training](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/core_concepts/post_training/): Fine-tuning Cosmos models on domain-specific datasets.
- [Evaluation](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/core_concepts/evaluation/): Benchmarking and quality assessment for Cosmos model outputs.
- [Prompt Guide](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/core_concepts/prompt_guide/): Effective prompting strategies for Cosmos Reason and Predict models.
- [Distillation](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/core_concepts/distillation/): Model distillation workflows for Cosmos.

## Recipes — Cosmos Reason 2 (Inference)

- [Worker Safety in a Classical Warehouse](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/recipes/inference/reason2/worker_safety/inference/): Zero-shot warehouse safety inspection using Cosmos Reason 2 to classify worker behaviors from video without custom model training. Model: nvidia/Cosmos-Reason2-2B. Compute: 1x A100 80GB.
- [Egocentric Social and Physical Reasoning](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/recipes/inference/reason2/intbot_showcase/inference/): Humanoid robot social interaction reasoning using Cosmos Reason 2 for egocentric video understanding. Covers IntBot service robot scenarios.
- [Video Search and Summarization](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/recipes/inference/reason2/vss/inference/): Semantic video search and natural language summarization over surveillance or operational footage using Cosmos Reason 2.

## Recipes — Cosmos Reason 2 (Post-Training)

- [Intelligent Transportation Post-Training](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/recipes/post_training/reason2/intelligent-transportation/post_training/): Fine-tune Cosmos Reason 2 on ITS (intelligent transportation systems) video data for traffic understanding.
- [Physical Plausibility Prediction](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/recipes/post_training/reason2/physical-plausibility-check/post_training/): Fine-tune Cosmos Reason 2 with the VideoPhy-2 dataset to assess whether generated video sequences are physically plausible.
- [AV Video Captioning and VQA Post-Training](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/recipes/post_training/reason2/video_caption_vqa/post_training/): Fine-tune Cosmos Reason 2 for autonomous vehicle video captioning and visual question answering using NVIDIA AV datasets.
- [3D AV Grounding Post-Training](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/recipes/post_training/reason2/av_3d_grounding/post_training/): Fine-tune Cosmos Reason 1 and 2 for 3D spatial grounding and object localization in autonomous vehicle driving scenes.

## Recipes — Cosmos Reason 1 (Post-Training)

- [Intelligent Transportation Post-Training (R1)](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/recipes/post_training/reason1/intelligent-transportation/post_training/): Fine-tune Cosmos Reason 1 on ITS video data for traffic and transportation understanding.
- [Physical Plausibility Prediction (R1)](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/recipes/post_training/reason1/physical-plausibility-check/post_training/): Fine-tune Cosmos Reason 1 with VideoPhy-2 to score physical plausibility of video sequences.
- [Spatial AI for Warehouse Post-Training](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/recipes/post_training/reason1/spatial-ai-warehouse/post_training/): Fine-tune Cosmos Reason 1 for warehouse spatial understanding, object localization, and navigation reasoning.
- [SFT for AV Video Captioning and VQA](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/recipes/post_training/reason1/av_video_caption_vqa/post_training/): Supervised fine-tuning of Cosmos Reason 1 for AV video captioning and visual question answering using NVIDIA internal datasets.
- [Cosmos Reason for MimicGen Temporal Localization](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/recipes/post_training/reason1/temporal_localization/post_training/): Fine-tune Cosmos Reason 1 for temporal localization of manipulation primitives in robot demonstration videos generated with MimicGen.
- [Wafer Map Anomaly Classification](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/recipes/post_training/reason1/wafermap_classification/post_training/): Fine-tune Cosmos Reason 1 for semiconductor wafer map defect classification from fabrication inspection imagery.

## Recipes — Cosmos Predict 2 (Post-Training)

- [Isaac GR00T-Dreams for Synthetic Trajectory Data](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/recipes/post_training/predict2/groot_dreams/post_training/): Generate synthetic robot trajectory data using Cosmos Predict 2 and NVIDIA Isaac GR00T-Dreams for visuomotor policy training.
- [Traffic Anomaly Generation](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/recipes/post_training/predict2/traffic_anomaly/post_training/): Generate synthetic traffic anomaly scenarios using Cosmos Predict 2 for AV safety evaluation.
- [Cosmos Policy: Fine-Tuning for Visuomotor Control](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/recipes/post_training/predict2/cosmos_policy/post_training/): Fine-tune Cosmos Predict 2 as a visuomotor policy model for robot manipulation tasks.

## Recipes — Cosmos Predict 2 (Inference)

- [Cosmos Predict 2 Text2Image for ITS](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/recipes/inference/predict2/its_text2image/inference/): Generate synthetic traffic and infrastructure imagery from text prompts using Cosmos Predict 2.

## Recipes — Cosmos Predict 2.5 (Post-Training)

- [LoRA Post-training for Sports Video Generation](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/recipes/post_training/predict2_5/sports_lora/post_training/): LoRA fine-tuning of Cosmos Predict 2.5 on sports video datasets for domain-specific video generation.

## Recipes — Cosmos Predict 2 (End-to-End)

- [Isaac GR00T-Dreams End-to-End Workflow](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/recipes/end2end/groot_dreams/): Full pipeline for synthetic robot training data generation using Cosmos Predict 2 and Isaac GR00T-Dreams.

## Recipes — Cosmos Transfer 1 (Inference)

- [Isaac GR00T-Mimic for Manipulation Motion](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/recipes/inference/transfer1/groot_mimic/inference/): Sim-to-real transfer for robot manipulation trajectories using Cosmos Transfer 1 and Isaac GR00T-Mimic.
- [Transfer 1 Weather Augmentation for ITS](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/recipes/inference/transfer1/its_weather/inference/): Augment traffic footage with synthetic weather conditions (rain, fog, night) using Cosmos Transfer 1.
- [Transfer 1 Sim2Real for Multi-View Warehouse](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/recipes/inference/transfer1/warehouse_sim2real/inference/): Sim-to-real domain transfer for multi-view warehouse camera footage using Cosmos Transfer 1.
- [Transfer Sim2Real for Robotics Navigation](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/recipes/inference/transfer1/robotics_nav/inference/): Sim-to-real transfer for mobile robot navigation footage using Cosmos Transfer 1.

## Recipes — Cosmos Transfer 2.5 (Inference)

- [Transfer 2.5 Sim2Real for Simulator Videos (CARLA)](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/recipes/inference/transfer2_5/carla_sim2real/inference/): Sim-to-real domain transfer from CARLA autonomous driving simulator to photorealistic video using Cosmos Transfer 2.5.
- [Domain Transfer for BioTrove Moths](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/recipes/inference/transfer2_5/biotrove_moths/inference/): Domain transfer for biological specimen video using Cosmos Transfer 2.5 applied to moth imagery from the BioTrove dataset.
- [Multi-Control Recipes with Transfer 2.5](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/recipes/inference/transfer2_5/multi_control/inference/): Multi-condition video generation and control using Cosmos Transfer 2.5 with combined spatial and temporal conditioning.
- [Style-Guided Video Generation](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/recipes/inference/transfer2_5/style_guided/inference/): Style-guided video generation using Cosmos Transfer 2.5 with reference image style conditioning.

## Recipes — Cosmos Transfer 2.5 (Post-Training)

- [Transfer 2.5 Multiview with World Scenario Map](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/recipes/post_training/transfer2_5/multiview_wsm/post_training/): Fine-tune Cosmos Transfer 2.5 for multi-view video generation with world scenario map conditioning.

## Recipes — Cosmos Transfer 1 + 2.5 (End-to-End)

- [SDG for Traffic Scenarios](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/recipes/end2end/sdg_traffic/): End-to-end synthetic data generation pipeline for traffic scenarios combining Cosmos Transfer 1 and 2.5.

## Recipes — Cosmos Curator (Data Curation)

- [Curate Data for Cosmos Predict Fine-Tuning](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/recipes/data_curation/predict_curation/): Data curation pipeline for Cosmos Predict fine-tuning using Cosmos Curator for video quality scoring and filtering.
- [Dataset Video Clustering (K-Means on Embeddings)](https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/recipes/data_curation/video_clustering/): Cluster video datasets using K-means on Cosmos embeddings to identify representative subsets for fine-tuning.

## Optional: Full Recipe Index (machine-readable)

All 31 recipes are available at: https://nvidia-cosmos.github.io/cosmos-cookbook/
Source repository: https://github.com/nvidia-cosmos/cosmos-cookbook
Model hub: https://huggingface.co/nvidia (search "Cosmos")
